tracks.meaning: to behave or act in a specified way, especially in relation to others or a particular situation
the manner in which a musical performance or piece is directed by a conductor
the manner in which a person behaves, especially in terms of morality or propriety
to carry on or engage in a business, negotiation, or transaction
to guide, lead, or escort someone from one place to another
a channel, duct, or pipe through which something is conveyed or transmitted
a tube or canal in the body through which a substance passes
a person's overall pattern of behavior and deportment, especially as observed by others
